channel.title: Blogs on Mark van Seventer
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on Mark van Seventer

item.title: A New Blog: What to Expect?
item.description: It has taken me a surprisingly long time to publish my first blog post. You’d say that, as an engineer, I’d be able to spin up a blogging platform in a matter of minutes. While that might be true, I am a perfectionist: I started at least ten blogs to only never finish a single one of them. Until today, that is. Welcome!
